title: Netherite Variants
body:
Ever wanted to get early game versions of netherite? Well now you can! This mod adds many variants of netherite, such as dirterite and stonerite, it will allow you to upgrade your tools and armour and progress faster than usual.
## 💥 Dependancies
All you need is this mod!
## Installation
Download this mod and put it into your mods folder in .minecraft
## Features
Dirterite - stone value
Stonerite - iron value
Diamonite - idk value
ironite - diamond value
I'm not going to say any more here, otherwise I'll give the game away
#
Adds upgrades to weapons and armour, for dirterite, the armour is crafted, and the tools are smithed, the same for stonerite (currently)
Adds a new villager and enchant
#
<details>
<summary>Phaser enchant</summary>
Default keybind 'R'

## 
Requires allowPhasing gamerule 'TRUE'
</details>

<details>
<summary>Villager</summary>
Netherite villager

## 

Workstation
  /give @s netherite_variants:netherite_workstation 1
  ## 
  Upgrades tools/armour at the cost of diamonds
</details>

<details>
<summary>BIG FEATURE</summary>
CAR!!!

## 
Get your seats ready! Go for a drive on the all new car!



</details>
